system.benefit: Can use Heavy Launcher weapons without penalty
system.description: The character can employ some of the most devastating weapons of the battlefield. The character can use weapons of the groups for which he has selected this Talent, choosing one new group each time the character obtains it. When a character attempts to use a weapon he does not have the correct Weapon Training Talent for, he suffers a –20 penalty to any relevant Weapon Skill or Ballistic Skill Test.
